title: Purple Curling Ribbon (457 Meters) 1 Count - Vibrant & Ribbon, Ideal for Gift Wrapping, Decor & Crafting
features: Purple CURLING RIBBON: Add a touch of elegance and charm to your gifts, crafts, and decor with our beautiful purple ribbon - the perfect accessory for any occasion.
IDEAL LENGTH: With a whopping 457 meters of ribbon in one roll, you'll have plenty of material for all your gift wrapping, decorative, and crafting needs without constantly needing to restock.
PREMIUM QUALITY: Our vibrant, purple ribbon boasts exceptional quality and a smooth, glossy finish, ensuring your projects look polished and eye-catching every time.
ONE COUNT CONVENIENCE: Each pack contains a single roll of ribbon, allowing you to easily manage your ribbon supply without the extra clutter of multiple rolls.

MULTIFUNCTIONAL & VERSATILE: Ideal for gift wrapping, party decor, crafting projects, balloon strings, and more - our purple curling ribbon offers endless possibilities to fuel your creativity and elevate your presentations.
